content: Confirmed: coursing and ad-hoc add-to-order use the IDENTICAL underlying fire mechanism -- 'When a server fires Course 2 from a handheld at table 8, the KDS should receive only those items -- not re-show everything already plated.' The only difference is the UI trigger (a course button vs. an ad-hoc item selection + Send/Stay). Server Item Firing generalizes further: any item defaults to held/unfired until explicitly sent, decoupled from formal course structure.
